occurrences.sourceTitle: Gree GMV6 DC Inverter VRF Units Service Manual
occurrences.section: 2.57 E1 Protection in Case of Too High Pressure
requiredMeasurements: Record supported high-side pressure indications before conclusion.
safetyNotes: Refrigerant-circuit, electrical, fan, and compressor checks require a qualified technician; keep safety protections active.
limitations: Verify the exact installed model and controller display.
Codebook evidence only; use the existing reviewed staging candidate for further engineering review.

occurrences.sourceTitle: Gree GMV6 DC Inverter VRF Units Service Manual
occurrences.section: 2.60 E4 Protection in Case of Too High Air Discharge Temperature of Compressor
requiredMeasurements: Record supported compressor discharge-temperature indications before conclusion.
safetyNotes: Electrical, refrigerant-circuit, and compressor checks require a qualified technician; keep safety protections active.
limitations: Verify the exact installed model and controller display.
Codebook evidence only; use the existing reviewed staging candidate for further engineering review.

occurrences.sourceTitle: Gree GMV6 DC Inverter VRF Units Service Manual
occurrences.section: 2.64 F5 Discharge Temperature Sensor Fault of Compressor 1
requiredMeasurements: Record supported compressor 1 discharge-temperature sensor indications before conclusion.
safetyNotes: Electrical and compressor sensor checks require a qualified technician; keep safety protections active.
limitations: Verify the exact installed model, compressor numbering, and controller display.
Generated preview evidence only; engineering review is required before any production staging change.
